about.title: About
about.name: Tatyana
about.subtitle: Personalized skincare guidance and formula literacy—calm, structured, no noise.
introParagraphs: I’m Tatyana, a cosmetologist and aesthetician. My practice blends attention to detail, a gentle communication style, and a habit of grounding advice in what we can verify: ingredients, how your skin responds, and the order of care steps.

Clients often say it feels easy to talk about sensitive topics with me—reactivity, breakouts, pigmentation, or fatigue from chasing every new launch. I don’t promise overnight miracles; I help you build a clear plan and spend wisely.
A strength I lean on is translating marketing into skin language: what a product is actually doing for you, and what can wait or be swapped for something kinder.
values: Context first: skin type, routine, stress, sleep, medications—anything that affects your barrier and how skin reacts.
Then ingredients and steps: cleansing, hydration, protection, actives—without overload or “ten steps for the sake of ten steps.”
We align expectations: what at-home care can do, what belongs with a dermatologist, and what to track over 2–4 weeks.
about.closing: If you value calm, evidence-minded guidance—without pressure and with respect for your comfort—I’d be glad to meet you in consultation.
about.photoAltWorkspace: Professional skincare setting and consultation atmosphere

articles.title: Articles
articles.lead: Six guides on skincare basics: cleansing, barrier, SPF, hydration, and gentle actives. Educational copy.

legalStub.body: This section is in progress. If you need a document urgently, reach out via Contacts.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.lead: Pick a channel you like—I reply during working hours and can explain how consultations work.
contacts.intro: Messengers, a call, or email—whatever feels right. For urgent topics, a second channel helps.
contacts.footnote: Messenger links open in the app or browser. You can copy the phone or email from the row.
contacts.decorText: Add a bit of context in your first message so the reply is on point. Mark it urgent if time‑sensitive.
